---
title: 高一数学期中测试卷
subject: 数学
grade: 高一
format:
  typst:
    output-file: student.pdf
paperflow:
  mode: student
  template: school-default
  show_score: false
  show_answer: false
  show_analysis: false
---

## 一、选择题

{{< question file="questions/q-001.md" score="5" >}}

## 二、填空题

{{< question file="questions/q-002.md" score="5" >}}

## 三、解答题

{{< question file="questions/q-003.md" score="20" >}}
